questionHtml: Outline why increasing the concentration of N2O5 increases the rate of reaction.
markschemeHtml:
greater frequency of collisions «as concentration increases»
OR
more collisions per unit time «as concentration increases» ✔


Accept “rate/chance/probability/likelihood” instead of “frequency”.

Do not accept just “more collisions”.

meta.title: Outline why increasing the concentration of N2O5 increases the rate of reaction.
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
